name: Brownie Fruit Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup reduced fat butter (1 stick), softened
8 oz Philadelphia Fat Free Cream Cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and 1 3/4 cups sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add 3 eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, mixing until blended.
3. Stir in flour and cocoa powder.
4. Spray a 12-inch round pizza pan with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Spread the brownie batter in the pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
7. Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
8. Add remaining 1/4 cup sugar, 1 egg, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, mixing until blended.
9. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the brownie.
10. Bake for another 15 minutes.
11. Cool and refrigerate.
12. Top with fresh fruit.
